# Keiran Flynn

> AI Product Builder for founders, operators and teams building with coding agents.

## Canonical website
- https://keiranflynn.com/

## Important pages
- Work: https://keiranflynn.com/work
- Services: https://keiranflynn.com/services
- Writing: https://keiranflynn.com/writing
- About: https://keiranflynn.com/about

- Conversation Archive: https://keiranflynn.com/blog
- Conversation page: https://keiranflynn.com/conversation

## Service summary
- Turns vague AI ideas into scoped products, prototypes, internal tools and live MVPs.
- Offers AI Product Sprints, AI MVP Build Partner work and Fractional AI Product Lead support.
- Works with Claude Code, Codex, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Next.js, Supabase, PostHog, Stripe, APIs, Chrome Extensions and agentic workflows.
- Built and scaled SchoolAI to 12,000+ users with zero paid acquisition.
- Built LLMnesia, a live Chrome extension for local-first AI conversation search across major LLM platforms.
- Built LunaCradle, a live AI-powered baby sleep guidance product using Next.js, Supabase, Stripe and an LLM provider.
- Built Flow402, an x402, Base and USDC agent payments prototype.
- Built 10+ products, prototypes and demos across AI workflows, web3 experiments, internal tools and product sites, including LLMnesia Insights, Job Radar and this site.

## Writing cluster
- /writing/coding-agents-for-product-teams - practical guide to using coding agents inside product teams.
- /writing/ai-prototype-to-product - how founders move from AI-generated prototype to production product.
- /writing/practical-ai-product-strategy - product strategy framework for deciding where AI belongs in a product.

## Positioning summary
Keiran Flynn is an AI product builder based in Thailand and working remotely with founders, operators and small teams. The site focuses on practical AI product strategy, coding-agent workflows, prototype hardening, MVP builds, internal tools and product judgment for AI-enabled software.
